title: Jmix Studio install-flow metadata
description: Metadata consumed by Jmix Studio to drive the 'Configure AI Agents' wizard. Defines a sequence of typed-input steps; each step optionally executes a shell command assembled from collected values.

install-flow.description: Top-level container for the wizard flow.

steps.description: Steps shown to the user in order. Steps with a 'runIf' that points to a falsy earlier step are skipped entirely.

step.description: A single step of the install flow. Steps may have an input (to collect a value), a command (to execute), or both.

id.description: Unique step identifier. Used to substitute the collected value into other steps' commands via ${id}, and as the target of 'runIf'. Required if the step has 'input' or is referenced elsewhere.

message.description: Header text shown above the input widget.

runIf.description: If set, the step is rendered only when the value of the referenced earlier step is truthy. Falsy values: checkbox=false, options-multi=empty, userInput=blank.

input.description: Optional input widget shown to the user. Discriminated by 'type'.

command.description: Optional per-OS shell command run after the user confirms the step. Supports ${id} placeholders that reference values from earlier steps and the implicit ${JMIX_VERSION} placeholder. The command is skipped when the step's own input value is falsy.

inputUserInput.description: Free-text input. Optionally validated against a regular expression.

regex.description: Java regular expression. The full value must match (Regex.matches semantics).

errorMessage.description: Inline error shown when the regex does not match. Falls back to a generic message.

placeholder.description: Hint shown inside the text field when it is empty.

default.description: Initial value pre-filled in the field.

inputOptions.description: Choice between predefined values. Single-select renders as a combo box; multi-select renders as a check-box list.

multi.description: When true, multiple choices may be selected; the resolved value is a comma-joined list of chosen 'value' fields.

value.description: Value substituted into commands when this choice is selected.

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the UI.

default.description: When true, this choice is preselected. For single-select inputs the last 'default: true' wins; for multi-select all matching choices are preselected.

label.description: Label shown next to the checkbox.

valueIfTrue.description: Substitution string when the checkbox is checked. Defaults to 'true'.

valueIfFalse.description: Substitution string when the checkbox is unchecked. Defaults to 'false'.

commandByOs.description: Per-OS shell command. The host OS is detected via SystemInfo and the corresponding entry is executed.
